1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality geometry by name

candidates.database_description: Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.

args.sql:
SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
    kommunenummer,
    kommunenavn
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality boundary by kommunenummer to avoid name ambiguity

2.description: Fetch 200-year storm-surge areas intersecting Kristiansand municipality

3.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones intersecting Kristiansand municipality

6.description: Find buildings from step 5 intersecting flood zones

candidates.database_description: Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.

args.sql:
SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
    kommunenummer,
    kommunenavn
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    kommunenummer = '4204';

SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE
    ST_Intersects(
        omrade,
        ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(:municipality_geom), 25833)
    );

SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    flomaktsomrader_1046636449ea40a9967e8c1f1212e3d8.flom200aar
WHERE
    ST_Intersects(
        omrade,
        ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(:municipality_geom), 25833)
    );

SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geometri, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
    bygningid
FROM
    matrikkelenbygning_5f3c106d777145f381088c8812350656.bygning
WHERE
    ST_Intersects(
        geometri,
        ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(:municipality_geom), 25833)
    );

1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones for Kristiansand (alternative to flomaktsomrader)

4.description: Intersect storm-surge areas and flood zones to find overlapping hazard areas

5.description: Fetch buildings in Kristiansand that intersect the combined hazard areas

6.description: Confirm buildings intersect both hazard layers

candidates.database_description: Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
